name: Eager Rookie
description: Fresh out of school and ready to work. Enthusiastic but makes frequent mistakes.

name: Bargain Betty
description: Has a decent eye for value but sometimes misjudges rare items.

name: Friendly Frank
description: Customers love him, but he tends to give away too many discounts.

name: Steady Sam
description: Reliable stocker who keeps shelves organized and prioritizes well.

name: Sharp-Eye Sara
description: Former collector with a keen sense for item values and market trends.

name: Smooth Talker Mike
description: Experienced salesperson who knows how to close a deal at fair prices.

name: Veteran Val
description: Twenty years in retail. Stocks fast, prioritizes rare items, never misses a beat.

name: Expert Elena
description: Master negotiator who maximizes sale prices while keeping customers happy.
